name_en: Check out the real photos. Original batch! Exclusive shipment.
name_cn:
Check out the real photos. Original batch! Exclusive shipment.
bbr handbag. This design is spot on, suitable for work or casual wear. The front and back are canvas, while the edges, sides, and interior are brown cowhide, a very classic color-block design. It comes with a detachable long shoulder strap for the perfect look!
